title: Weather effects Backport
description: Backports the 1.21.6 weather fog effect to 1.20.1
body:
**What is Weather Effects Backport?**

This mod backports the 1.21.6 raining effect to 1.20.1 with some additions!

The weather effect appears when it is raining, snowing, and if a thunder storm shows up, the rain fog will be more darker than the normal rain fog

The mod allows you to Enabled or Disabled the raining effect with the /weather_effect command!

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aLKBj1X3stc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Don't worry about compatibility — the weather effect works perfectly with Embeddium and other mods that change the way Minecraft renders things. The mod is compatible with them.

![Weather effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35c696fb591734b0f224f234422edc637cd62588_0.webp)
